description: Chrome bookmarks parser reads Bookmarks JSON file and emits BrowserEvent per URL bookmark (not folders)
steps: Read file as serde_json::Value, walk roots.bookmark_bar, roots.other, roots.synced recursively
Only emit events for nodes where type == 'url' (skip folders)
date_added is a string of WebKit microseconds; parse as i64, call webkit_to_unix_ns()
Description: node name. Attrs: url, name
Test: parse_empty_chrome_bookmarks — roots with empty children yield 0 events
Test: parse_chrome_bookmarks_flat — 1 URL + 1 nested URL in folder yields 2 events (folders excluded)
